name: Fedtrust
description_short: FedTrust Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering savings accounts, loans, and banking services to individuals in the Memphis, Tennessee area.
description_long:
FedTrust Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned and member-operated financial institution based in Memphis, Tennessee. The credit union has been serving members with a commitment to personalized, confidential service and competitive financial products. With physical branches and online banking capabilities, FedTrust positions itself as an alternative to traditional banks by emphasizing member ownership and relationship-based service. The organization maintains a straightforward membership model: "Once a member, always a member."

FedTrust offers a comprehensive range of financial products including multiple savings account types (Share Savings, Share Draft, Christmas Club, Certificates of Deposit, IRAs, and Insured Share Management Accounts), various loan products (auto, motorcycle, motor home, conventional mortgage, and signature loans up to $15,000), and digital banking services through It'sMe247 Online Banking. Members can access funds via ATM and VISA debit cards with favorable foreign ATM terms (four free withdrawals monthly at foreign ATMs). The credit union also provides payroll deduction and direct deposit services.

FedTrust distinguishes itself through localized service concentrated in the Memphis area, with a main branch at 167 N. Main Street and additional branch locations. The institution explicitly notes it is NOT part of the CO-OP Shared Branching Network, meaning members have limited access to shared branching services that larger credit unions offer. The credit union emphasizes personal, confidential service and prompt handling of borrowing needs, with the ability to apply for loans online.

As a regional credit union, FedTrust is best suited for Memphis-area residents seeking relationship-based banking with member ownership benefits and competitive loan rates. However, the lack of shared branching network access and limited geographic footprint may be restrictive for members who travel frequently or relocate. The organization represents a traditional credit union model focused on local community service rather than digital-first or national reach.
services: Insured Share Management Accounts (ISMA and Jumbo ISMA)
VISA debit cards with ATM access
Direct deposit and payroll deduction services
pros: Member-owned and operated structure means profits are returned to members as dividends rather than to external shareholders
Four free foreign ATM withdrawals per month included with debit card, plus $1 per transaction after that
Diverse loan products including auto, motorcycle, motor home, conventional mortgages, and signature loans up to $15,000
Multiple specialized savings accounts including Christmas Club, IRAs, Certificates of Deposit, and Convenient Money Certificates with flexible terms
Online banking through It'sMe247 allows account access 24/7 from anywhere
Competitive dividend rates on savings products, including higher rates for CDs and IRA accounts
Simple online loan application process with prompt, personal service
cons: NOT a member of CO-OP Shared Branching Network, severely limiting branch access outside Memphis
Limited geographic footprint - only Memphis, Tennessee location(s) restrict membership to local area residents
Restricted business hours (9 AM - 4 PM Monday-Friday only) with no weekend or evening access at physical branches
Early withdrawal penalty of $15 assessed on Christmas Club accounts if funds withdrawn before mid-October transfer date
Insured Share Management Account (ISMA) requires high minimum balance ($3,000 standard, $100,000 for Jumbo ISMA)
best_for: Memphis, Tennessee residents seeking personalized, relationship-based banking with member ownership benefits
Local savers who value higher dividend rates and are willing to forgo shared branching network access
Credit union members preferring traditional, community-focused financial institutions over large national banks
Borrowers seeking competitive auto, motorcycle, motor home, or mortgage loans with simple online application processes
diagnosis: FedTrust Federal Credit Union is best for Memphis-area residents who value member ownership, personalized service, and competitive savings/loan rates and are willing to accept limited geographic reach and no shared branching network access. The main caveat is that membership is practically restricted to the Memphis area, making it unsuitable for those who travel frequently or need branch access across multiple states.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Fedtrust — Credit Union in MEMPHIS, TN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Fedtrust — NCUA-insured credit union in MEMPHIS, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
